Who We Are

parTAY
Design Co.

Beautiful setups for unforgettable celebrations.

We are Montgomery's premier party rental company, delivering premium-quality bounce houses, water slides, and elegant event setups to families, schools, and organizations across the city and surrounding areas.

From epic water slide adventures to refined white bounce castles for upscale soirées — we bring the vision to life with meticulous care and on-time, friendly service every single time.

01

Bounce House Rentals

Premium inflatables for all ages and aesthetics — from playful to elegant.

02

Flower Wall Backdrops

Stunning floral installations that transform any space into a photo moment.

03

Complete Party Packages

Curated setups with everything you need for a truly unforgettable event.
